programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Cruz feels the burden of his increased responsibilities; Kidd, Gallo and Carver get caught in the middle of a gang war on a call; Herrmann wrangles Trudy for help lifting Cindy's mood.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Mouch builds a classic fire truck model for the Deputy District Chief but needs assistance from Gallo and Ritter; Brett and Violet encounter multiple victims with a strange set of symptoms; Cindy's chemotherapy results loom over the Herrmann family.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to Firehouse 51 to serve with Kidd on a special task force; with Tony close to breaking the CFD's perfect attendance record, Mouch and Capp work to keep him safe; old grudges resurface when Gallo reunites with a family member.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Boden, Ritter, Herrmann and Kidd work together to take down a local politician responsible for a chemical fire; after his aunt's accident, Gallo worries about their future; Brett steps in to perform Dylan's magic show when he's out of town.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As a series of rapes on the Upper West Side puts the city on edge, a celebrity chef (Cybill Shepherd) fears she is the next victim when someone follows her home; Detective Benson has a hard time overcoming her traumatic ordeal.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: ADA Barba finds that a friend (Kirk Acevedo) -- with a connection to a mayoral candidate frontrunner -- is accused of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a criminology student is raped and murdered, detectives hunt for a suspect with an expert knowledge of forensic medicine.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman attempts to kidnap a child she believes is her daughter; while DNA tests are in progress, Benson traces the confusion about the child's origins back to a fertility doctor.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Fin investigate the brutal rape and murder of a prostitute, and the prime suspects turn out to be a group of teens suspected of re-enacting a favorite video game.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a wealthy couple laundering money for South American drug dealers is murdered, former ADA Alexandra Cabot (Stephanie March) returns from witness protection to help solve the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro must face the consequence of his reckless behavior; when an online ad for escorts leads to the rape and robbery of tourists, Benson discovers she has a connection to one of the suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson struggles to balance work and her new role of foster mother; when Amaro arrests a young prostitute with connections to Noah's mother, his undercover work sets off a dangerous chain of events.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro's by-the-book handling of a starlet's arrest gets him back on the SVU squad in time to investigate the actress's latest offense, statutory rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Rollins strikes a deal with the managers of a gambling club in order to protect her job, she ends up drawing the suspicion of Benson and Tutuola.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: High school football star Cedric Jones goes missing in New York and his uncle seeks help from their hometown friend, Detective Rollins; Cedric goes on a recruiting trip from Hudson University's football team; when the cops find him in jail, they suspect the truth may have led to a cruel prank; Sgt. Benson's investigation into the football team and its popular coach uncovers several victims of abus

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A columnist who has been given access to the squad for a story declares a hate crime case a hoax, leaving the victim under media scrutiny and Benson fighting to get the case back on solid ground.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a single mom is arrested for leaving her young daughter alone for days, Sgt. Benson suspects the woman may have been abused in her own childhood.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Taking an active approach to catching sex offenders, the team targets a photographer with a secret life whose fantasies may have crossed into reality.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a suspect is gravely injured and the case becomes a public spectacle, Amaro's badge is on the line; Cragen surprises everyone with an announcement.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an underage runaway is found beaten and raped, the SVU team works with federal prosecutor Connie Rubirosa (Alana De La Garza); ADA Barba suspects a cover-up when he fails to get the help he needs from Jersey law enforcement.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Three young girls' search for a mythical character leads to one of them becoming injured and the other two disappearing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro suspects the boyfriend of a missing girl is involved with a gang; Sgt. Benson becomes the SVU's new commanding officer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sgt. Voight and Detectives Lindsay and Halstead work with Sgt. Benson and the SVU as they investigate the roots of a child pornography site; tension between Benson and Voight threatens the investigation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When detective Tutuola finds security footage of a sportscaster being physically abusive to his girlfriend, Benson seeks help from Assistant DA Barba to convince the victim to fight back.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After being found unconscious in her hotel bathroom, an Atlanta detective -- in town for a law-enforcement conference -- says that she was raped; Rollins discovers a personal connection to the suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a female video game developer who has been receiving death threats refuses to delay the launch of her new game, the cops must work to protect her.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Carisi's sister's fiancé falls back into bad habits and accuses his parole officer of rape, Carisi must investigate.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Efforts to find an 8-year-old boy kidnapped for ransom are hindered by tension between the child's estranged parents; Sgt. Benson is asked to take the lieutenant's exam and officially become the leader of the squad.

programme.desc: Benson and Stabler probe an assault and carjacking, only to find that it is connected to illegal trafficking in painkillers apparently headed by an elderly woman (Melinda Dillon).

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The dismembered body of a woman is found in a junkyard, and detectives must determine who killed her and who attempted to harvest organs from her corpse.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When two police officers in separate precincts attack their wives and demonstrate suicidal behavior, Benson and Stabler suspect a malaria drug both men received while serving in a reserve unit in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A distraught pregnant woman threatens suicide, claiming that her child is a product of rape, but when the case goes to trial, the woman's willingness to settle for cash makes detectives suspicious.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a high-school student is brutally assaulted, detectives interview a suspect who becomes enraged and attacks Detective Tutuola.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives suspect that Gabriel Thurman, an activist trying to stop the spread of AIDS, murdered a homosexual couple who had a new form of HIV.

programme.desc: Detective Stabler and CSU technician Millie Vizcarrondo (Paula Garcés) investigate a child's remains found at a construction site and find they belong to one of five boys reported missing 30 years earlier.

programme.desc: When a series of rapes is linked to a speed-dating service, Benson goes undercover and discovers Mike Jergens (Dean Cain) is the assailant.

programme.desc: When a runaway teenage girl is found badly beaten, doctors discover the beating killed her unborn child, and detectives begin to question the father.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Sakthivel, an influential man, is upset with his son Chinnarasu's careless attitude. He is further infuriated when Chinnarasu suddenly refuses to marry his cousin, Gowri. Starring R. Sarathkumar & Devayani

programme.title: Raid
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, an individual from Chennai takes an oath to eradicate wrongdoers in society. However. he faces many struggles and problems from the enemies. Cast : Vikram Prabhu

programme.title: Action
programme.desc: Subash, an Indian Army colonel, is sent to catch the mastermind behind a terror attack. However, the mission gets complicated when he discovers that the terrorists plan a political upheaval in India.

programme.title: Engeyum Kadhal
programme.desc: Kayal's life turns sour when she falls in love with Kamal, but he returns to India and start to miss her. Cast : Jayam Ravi & Hansika.

programme.title: Kadhal Rojavae
programme.desc: A young girl flees home in search of her lover. She is chased by goons and is saved by a journalist, whom she ultimately falls in love with. Cast : Pooja Kumar & Vishnu

programme.title: Gokulathil Seethai
programme.desc: A man who hitherto only used women before dumping them is bemused as well as dazzled by a woman who refuses to yield to his advances. Starring Karthik,Suvaletchmi.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-7
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-8
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Bear's Mission With Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear's Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK's toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Six Australians embark on one of the most thrilling and dangerous training courses Australia has to offer – saltwater crocodile wrangling - and are immediately thrown in at the deep end when an emergency at the farm means they have to help separate two giant males who are up for a blue.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn's frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Renee catches a croc three times her size but Ryan is struggling. John takes Renee and Ryan on an overnight trip where they must share a motel room with crocodiles and the chance to go to Kakadu is on everyone's mind.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: John takes Lyn and Luke to Kakadu where they raid nests and catch a four and a half metre male croc for research. Lyn returns to the place where her 11-year old granddaughter was taken by a croc and is finally at peace.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-7
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-8
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Bear's Mission With Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear's Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK's toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: Adam has an idea for a new event for hybrid athletes called Hybrid Games, so the team travels to W.A to be guinea pigs with powerlifting, Xterra and a beach OCR.

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertakenby European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840's, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, inthe very interior of the country.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Central Victoria is ‘river & ranges country', and is an easy drive out of Victoria's capital,Melbourne. Epic scenery, outstanding natural beauty, lots of history, and down to earth hospitality, ourroad-trip through Central Victoria does not disappoint.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: Ultimate Freedive
programme.desc: World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: In this episode crane operator Nick, is called out to a very unusual job removing two old portable cabins from a recycling yard and replacing with new ones. But with each cabin weighing at least four tonnes and overhead electrical cables to negotiate this is a highly hazardous job. Seasoned recovery op Jim's must rescue an abandoned Toyota from a live lane on the M1. Recovery op Rory visits a depo

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: In this week's episode Recovery Op Jim is called to the scene of two crashed artics on the M1. But as Jim and his team begin to pull the truck and trailer apart, they discover the crash has split the hydraulic oil tank and it's now leaking all over the road making the job a whole lot more complicated! Recovery Op Rory attends what looks like a simple job, but some hidden vandalism leaves him scrat

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 19
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 25
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.title: THEATER DRAMA : MANISNYA KOLAK SAMPAI KE HATI
programme.desc: A program drama FTV about love, friendship, family, happy, sad etc, played by popular actor and actress Indonesia.

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 8
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 85
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Love At First Bite - EP 6 / 遇见你真香
programme.desc: Xi Yue tells Chen Guang that she needs to create a dish for the launch of a new pot and her boss says that it cannot be a repeated dish, he agrees to help. Chen Guang teaches Xi Yue how to make a dish under 30 minutes with a versatile marinate, onions, ginger and garlic. Xi Yue is grateful to Chen Guang and promises to help him find the mushroom plant at all costs.

programme.title: Little NeZha - Hero of Heaven and Earth - EP 17 / 少年英雄小哪吒
programme.desc: It tells the story of Nezha growing through learning both the civil and martial arts, punishing evil and promoting good, enrich the populace, and keep the world in his heart. Through overcoming one ordeal after another, he becomes a young hero, embodying the cultural spirit of Nezha: justice and courage, perseverance, and loyalty, filial piety, benevolence, and righteousness.

programme.title: Pedal On For Love - EP 4 / 骑心协力
programme.desc: Gefan, a novice to long-distance cycling, embarks on a 502-kilometer journey from Hoi An, Vietnam, with only a sheer determination to complete the journey. He would never have expected harsh climates and steep ascents awaiting him before crossing into Banlung, Cambodia. Will this expedition break or make him?

programme.title: Uniquely Ours - EP 19 / 异家人
programme.desc: Yuling confesses to a drunk Ruiyang and kisses him. Unbeknownst to her, he is feigning sleep. Despite liking Yuling, Ruiyang is afraid of taking the first step and distances himself from her, to her dismay. Ruiyang secretly posts Ziyao's toy figure on a crowdfunding website. When Ruiyang fails to hand the funds raised to Ziyao, Ziyao accuses him of being a scam and slaps him.

programme.title: Uniquely Ours - EP 20 / 异家人
programme.desc: Guanjun strives to save his marriage, but Minchen's mind remains unchanged. Convinced that Ziyao is the new dad Shaokang spoke of, he confronts Ziyao. Aware he has nowhere to run, Keith ambushes Ruiyang, who is narrowly saved by Guanjun. Meanwhile, Ziyao, who is on his last legs, gets a heart attack.
